ddls:
CREATE TABLE "target_types" (
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target type */,
  "target_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the target type (e.g., Permanent Circle, Associated Object) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target type */,
  "target_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each target type for easier referencing */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the target type is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "familiarity_levels" (
  "familiarity_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each familiarity level */,
  "familiarity_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the familiarity level (e.g., Very Familiar, Seen Casually) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the familiarity level */,
  "familiarity_level_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each familiarity level for easier referencing */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the familiarity level is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("familiarity_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_familiarity_data" (
  "target_familiarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target familiarity data point */,
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target type */,
  "familiarity_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the familiarity level */,
  "mishap" TEXT /* Mishap probability range */,
  "similar_area" TEXT /* Similar area probability range */,
  "off_target" TEXT /* Off-target probability range */,
  "on_target" TEXT /* On-target probability range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., field test, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_familiarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_familiarity_data_familiarity_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("familiarity_level_id") REFERENCES familiarity_levels ("familiarity_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_familiarity_data_target_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_type_id") REFERENCES target_types ("target_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the researcher's password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the researcher (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., target familiarity, hit probability) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, archived) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The path to the report file if it is stored as a file */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A summary of the report's findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
